messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0166",
  "title": "社交娱乐",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 社交娱乐

JustTalk

Bass Booster & Equalizer

Kito

message.content: This section addresses the topic of "Social Entertainment" (社交娱乐) and enumerates three specific entities: JustTalk, Bass Booster & Equalizer, and Kito. It can answer retrieval questions regarding which applications or software products are listed under the social entertainment category. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
